summary: HR Admin Module Testing - Iteration 98. All 14 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI components verified across 6 tabs (Dashboard, Employees, Attendance, Leave, Payroll, Settings). The HR module is fully functional with GPS-based check-in/out, configurable department timings, leave management, salary calculation, and digital payslip generation.

issues: Employee Vinoth shows ₹0 Net Salary - salary structure (Basic, HRA, PA, FA) needs to be configured for the staff member

action_items: Consider adding salary data (basic_salary, hra, pa, fa) to the existing staff member Vinoth for complete payroll demonstration
seed_data_creation: Marked attendance for Vinoth on 2026-03-24 (Present) and 2026-01-10 (Paid Leave) via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: HR Admin module fully functional. 1 active staff member (Vinoth, EMP0001). All HR APIs working: /api/hr/dashboard, /api/hr/settings, /api/hr/attendance/monthly, /api/hr/attendance/mark, /api/hr/attendance/late-report, /api/hr/leave/requests, /api/hr/salary/calculate, /api/hr/salary/list, /api/hr/payslip/{staff_id}. Frontend has 6 tabs: Dashboard (5 metric cards), Employees (directory with search/filter), Attendance (calendar with month navigation and legend), Leave (filter buttons for Pending/Approved/Rejected/All), Payroll (month selector + Calculate Salary button), Settings (Department Timings + Leave Limits configurable).

hr_dashboard.evidence: Returns total_staff, today_present, today_absent, today_late, pending_leaves

hr_settings_get.evidence: Returns department_timings (6 departments) and leave_limits (PL:12, SL:12, CL:6, WFH:24)

hr_settings_patch.evidence: Successfully updated Engineering timing to 08:30-17:30 with 20min grace

attendance_monthly.evidence: Returns month, year, days_in_month, staff array with days and summary

attendance_mark.evidence: Successfully marked Present and Paid Leave for staff

late_report.evidence: Returns month, year, employees array with late_days and total_late_minutes

leave_requests.evidence: Returns list filterable by status (pending, approved, rejected)

salary_calculate.evidence: Returns month, year, working_days, payroll array with full salary breakdown

salary_list.evidence: Returns computed payroll for specified month/year

payslip.evidence: Returns payroll, staff, company info with full salary breakdown

dashboard.evidence: 5 metric cards (Total Employees, Present Today, Absent Today, Late Today, Pending Leaves) + Department Strength section

employees.evidence: Employee Directory with search input, department filter, employee table with avatar, name, code, department, contact, joined date, net salary, status

attendance.evidence: Calendar grid with month navigation (prev/next), legend (P, PL, SL, CL, W, H, A), Calendar/Late Report toggle, per-day status cells

leave.evidence: Filter buttons (Pending, Approved, Rejected, All), leave requests table with Employee, Type, Dates, Days, Reason, Status, Actions columns

payroll.evidence: Month/Year selectors, Calculate Salary button, Total Gross/Deductions/Net Pay summary cards, payroll table with Working, Present, LOP, Late, Gross, Deductions, Net Pay, Payslip columns

settings.evidence: Company Information (name, address), Department Timings (6 departments with start/end/grace), Annual Leave Limits (PL, SL, CL, WFH with annual limit and carry forward), Save Settings button
